metadata.title: Generate a governed lovable_build_prompt for a blueprint_design_doc that resolves depth_tier_ambiguity from a chaotic_power_user in global_cross_border context, using failure_lens to enforce explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a governed lovable_build_prompt for a blueprint_design_doc that resolves depth_tier_ambiguity from a chaotic_power_user in global_cross_border context, using failure_lens to enforce explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.
mission.success_definition: The generated prompt contains at least one validation gate per chaos input type.; The prompt's compiled_intent includes all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; The prompt explicitly references failure_lens and depth_tier_ambiguity resolution.; The prompt is self-contained and can be executed by Codex runtime without additional clarification.

in_scope.item: The prompt must produce a blueprint_design_doc artifact with clear depth tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE, covering cross-border compliance, user chaos patterns, and failure_lens-driven constraints. It must include explicit validation gates for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated prompt contains at least one validation gate per chaos input type.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: The prompt's compiled_intent includes all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The prompt explicitly references failure_lens and depth_tier_ambiguity resolution.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The prompt is self-contained and can be executed by Codex runtime without additional clarification.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.app_goal: Generate a governed lovable_build_prompt for a blueprint_design_doc that resolves depth_tier_ambiguity from a chaotic_power_user in global_cross_border context, using failure_lens to enforce explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.

user_flows.item: The prompt must produce a blueprint_design_doc artifact with clear depth tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE, covering cross-border compliance, user chaos patterns, and failure_lens-driven constraints. It must include explicit validation gates for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

build_steps.item: The prompt must produce a blueprint_design_doc artifact with clear depth tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE, covering cross-border compliance, user chaos patterns, and failure_lens-driven constraints. It must include explicit validation gates for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

acceptance_criteria.item: The generated prompt contains at least one validation gate per chaos input type.
The prompt's compiled_intent includes all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
The prompt explicitly references failure_lens and depth_tier_ambiguity resolution.
The prompt is self-contained and can be executed by Codex runtime without additional clarification.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
